meta_title: Square Image Resizer | 1:1 Aspect Ratio Converter
meta_description: Make your image square instantly. Perfect 1:1 aspect ratio converter for profile pictures, social media grids, and square PNGs. 100% private.
subtitle: Convert any rectangle picture to a perfect square (1:1 aspect ratio). Crop, pad, or stretch to make your image square instantly.

tool_workspace.description: Upload an image to make it square. It automatically sets the aspect ratio to 1:1.

how_to.title: How to Make an Image Square
how_to.step1_text: Select your JPG or PNG file.
how_to.step2_text: The dimensions will automatically lock to a 1:1 ratio.
how_to.step3_text: Choose 'Fit' to add padding or 'Crop' to trim the edges.
how_to.step4_text: Click resize to get your perfectly square image.

faq.q1: Why do I need a 1:1 aspect ratio?
faq.a1: A 1:1 aspect ratio (square) is the standard format for profile pictures, Instagram grids, and many product listings.
faq.a2: Not unless you want it to! You can use the 'Crop' mode to cut off the edges, or 'Fit' mode to add borders to your rectangle picture to make it square without stretching.
